headline: Tractor Supply Is Today’s Worst S&P 500 Stock. Here’s Why.
summary: Tractor Supply stock is falling after the farm supplier misses first-quarter earnings expectations and keeps 2026 guidance steady.

headline: Warning signs the US consumer is beginning to crack
summary: Consumers may be facing spending challenges in the coming months, according to Goldman Sachs' Ronnie Walker. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma and B. Riley Wealth Chief Market Strategist Art Hogan join the Opening Bid panel to address whether the US consumer is weakening, especially amid rising gas prices (RB=F).

headline: Trump Encourages Companies Not to Seek Tariff Refunds
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump said he’d remember companies that decline to seek refunds on duties paid after the Supreme Court struck down a large swath of his tariffs. headline: Americans Paid Trump's Tariff: Corporations Now Sit On $166 Billion Refund
summary: CBP opened the refund portal Monday. Only importers can file — leaving U.S. households, who absorbed 86% of the tariff passthrough, shut out of the process.

raw.headline: Americans Paid Trump's Tariff: Corporations Now Sit On $166 Billion Refund
raw.summary: CBP opened the refund portal Monday. Only importers can file — leaving U.S. households, who absorbed 86% of the tariff passthrough, shut out of the process.

headline: Costco quietly bumps its quarterly dividend by 13%
summary: Research from Vanguard found that about half of investors prefer to invest in dividend-paying companies, believing such stocks deliver higher returns and lower volatility than non-dividend payers.
